content_body: Last year, we came to this cabin on Valentine’s Weekend. At that time, we were only dating. We discussed marriage. We got married this year. We had to come back to the same cabin because we had so much fun. We needed a small getaway to just relax and be surrounded by the wilderness. We went to the annual Chili Cook-off, went to Twin Falls, and took a hike in the National Forest, but mostly enjoyed each other in front of the fire while listening to Christian music. We hope to have our own cabin one day.
title: Valentine's Weekend
